title: Drive to Unlock $840 Billion in Cash Lifts Japan Stocks Outlook
description: A new revision to Japan’s corporate governance code may free up some of the $840 billion in cash held by listed companies and drive another wave of Japanese stock market buying.
content: A new revision to Japan’s corporate governance code may free up some of the $840 billion in cash held by listed companies and drive another wave of Japanese stock market buying.
